JoJo Founder & Head Walker
About JoJo

A dog lover through
& through

Hi, I'm JoJo — a Certified Professional Dog Trainer and Canine First Aid–certified dog walker based in North York. I built Walks With JoJo around one idea: quality over quantity.

My goal isn't to care for as many dogs as possible — it's to provide a service where every dog is truly seen, safely handled, thoughtfully matched, and cared for with real professionalism and attention.

🎓  Certified Professional Dog Trainer — Good Dog Academy
🩺  Canine First Aid — DogSafe Academy
🏅  Certified Dog Walker
🏙️  Licensed to operate in the City of Toronto
🛡️  Fully Insured
🎉  Free Meet & Greet + Trial Walk for all new clients
Services & Pricing

Transparent pricing,
no surprises

🦮⭐ Signature

Boutique Pack Walk

Small curated groups of up to 4 compatible dogs. Structured, enriching, safe — never overcrowded.

Contact
max 4 dogs · 1-hour walks

In-Home Daycare

Calm family-style daycare in my own home. Walks, rest, enrichment all day. Max 2 dogs.

from $40/day

Your dog stays as part of our family — daily walks, feeding to schedule, constant care. Max 2 dogs.

from $60/night

Why Choose JoJo

Quality over quantity — always

01

Certified Dog Trainer

Good Dog Academy certified trainer. Structured, calm handling for every dog in our care.

02

Canine First Aid

DogSafe Academy certified. Trained to recognise and respond to emergencies on every walk.

03

Fully Insured

Licensed to operate in Toronto. Fully insured. Everything above board, always.

04

Home, Not a Kennel

Max 2 dogs in daycare or boarding at a time. Your dog always gets real, personal attention.

Reviews

North York loves JoJo

⭐ 5.0 · Read on Google
★★★★★
"Monet stayed with Joana for four nights, and I couldn't have asked for a better person to care for my dog. She was incredibly kind, attentive, and loving the entire time. Even with the cold weather and tough conditions, she made sure Monet was always safe, warm, and well protected. Joana truly went above and beyond. Monet was comfortable, happy, and clearly well cared for."
L
Liliana AtencioGoogle · 2 months ago
★★★★★
"We use Jojo for dog boarding and have found her to be reliable, loving towards our pup, and very knowledgeable. Her communications are 5 star — photos throughout the day and detailed summary reports each night. Excellent service!"
N
Nicole NelGoogle · a month ago
★★★★★
"I highly recommend Jojo. She is incredibly organized, punctual and a fantastic communicator. She walks my two high-energy labradors, who can be a handful, and she somehow manages to wrangle them with total ease."
M
Matthew ConnorsGoogle · 3 months ago
★★★★★
"Joanna had a fantastic walk with Mani. She was very thoughtful about discussing his particular habits, triggers, and needs. She kept Mani safe and happy, and provided him with the exercise and outdoor experience he needed. I felt confident and comfortable, and would definitely use Joanna again."
P
Paul C.Google · 5 months ago
★★★★★
"Joanna is a God sent to our family — very professional, organized and accommodating with any last minute requests. My dog loves her. She has been helping us since September 2025 on a full-time basis, from day walks to daycare to boarding. Highly recommended!"
